name: LifeQuest Fitness Center
description: LifeQuest Fitness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pasco, WA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Longfellow Elementary School
description: Longfellow Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Pasco, WA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms.
hours: 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM Helpful Links Peachjar E-Flyers Careers Non-Discrimination Privacy Policy (opens in new window/tab) Site Map Accessibility (opens in new window/tab) Powered by Finalsite

name: Pasco City Hall
description: Come play pickleball at Pasco City Hall in Pasco, WA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
